tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   x2

Verse

  Staring at a maple leaf
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
  Leaning on the mother tree[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]   
  I said to myself we all lost touch[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
  Your favourite fruit is chocolate covered cherries[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Em[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]
  And seedless watermelon ohhhh[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
  Nothing from the ground is good enough[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]


Pre Chorus   

  Body rise
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  look what's over me[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]


Chorus

  Oh chariot, your golden waves
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     
  Are walking down upon this face[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
  Oh chariot, I'm singing out loud[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
  To guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
  Give me your...[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]


Interlude

       ...Strength
[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]  

[ch]Em[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] 


Verse

  Remember seeking moons rebirth
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
  Rains made mirrors of the earth[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]   
  The sun was just yellow energy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch] 
  It is a living promise land[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]
  Even over fields of sand[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
  Since it's filled my body, covered me[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]


Pre Chorus

  Bringing back
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
  More than a memory[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]


Chorus

  Oh chariot, your golden waves
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     
  Are walking down upon this face[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
  Oh chariot, I'm singing out loud[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
  To guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
  Give me your strength[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]


Bridge

  You'll be my vacation away from this place
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]   
  You know what I want[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]D[/ch]
  Holding that cup,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]
  It's pouring over the sides[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]G[/ch]
  You make me wanna spread my arms and fly[/tab]
[ch]C[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]


Chorus

  Oh chariot, your golden waves
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]     
  Are walking down upon this face[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
  Oh chariot, I'm singing out loud[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
  To guide me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
  Give me your strength[/tab]
[ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]


  Give me your strength (Chariot)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
  Give me your strength (Chariot)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
  Give me your strength (Chariot)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
  Give me your strength (Chariot)[/tab]
[ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]

Keep this going to the end and finish with a G.
